en-US.title: RayHealth EVV
en-US.subtitle: Care visits, on the clock
en-US.description:
RayHealth EVV helps caregivers complete assigned home-care visits accurately and securely.

Caregivers can:
• View today’s assigned visits and schedules
• Record GPS-verified clock-in and clock-out events
• Resume an active visit after reopening the app
• Record performed, refused, or incomplete care-plan tasks
• Preserve punches in encrypted device storage during a network interruption and sync them when connectivity returns
• Review visit history, training, profile, and linked agencies

RayHealth EVV is designed for authorized caregivers working with participating home-care agencies. An agency-issued account is required. The app supports Electronic Visit Verification workflows; it does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment recommendations.

Location is requested only while recording an EVV clock-in or clock-out. RayHealth does not use personal data for advertising or cross-app tracking.
en-US.promoText: Secure EVV clock-in, clock-out, care tasks, and encrypted offline recovery for authorized home-care caregivers.
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial release with caregiver schedules, GPS-verified EVV punches, care-plan task outcomes, training access, and encrypted offline recovery.
